label: RQ3 answer: score BOTH routers as separate sub-scores (inter-skill advisor vs intra-skill in-SKILL.md router) — distinct layers, distinct inputs, distinct remediation
Inter-skill sub-score must reuse the advisor's real 5-lane scorer + existing advisor_validate corpus/holdout top-1 harness, not re-grep frontmatter substrings
Two verifiable inter-skill failure modes: derived-dominant confidence ceiling 0.72 < 0.8 invoke bar; ambiguity-cluster rate (sub-0.05 sibling tie) as near-neighbor confusion metric
'Properly utilized' = five-stage conjunction funnel (reachable->activated->routed->discovered->useful); first failing stage is the finding

Repo-verified divergence inside target skill: advisor trigger 'dynamic profiling' routes but in-skill keyword 'dynamic profile' fails substring match -> inter-pass/intra-miss, proving separate sub-scores
RQ4: pure generated-from-self fixtures are mathematically circular against substring routers (X subset of X) — guaranteed false pass; usable for coverage only if transformed+decontaminated
RQ4 answer: three-tier fixtures (T1 generated-decontaminated / T2 hand-authored holdout / T3 adversarial); T1<->T2 gap is the circularity meter, mirroring advisor corpus<->holdout 3pp gap
T1 made non-circular by metamorphic paraphrase + iter-002 contamination linter + two-author separation (mechanical gold key vs blind prompt author)
Coverage measured (per-intent/per-resource/per-negative) and deduped via the existing mutation-coverage signature pattern so generated tier is provably broad, not padded
